title: GROOM PROFESSIONAL Tranquil Dog Shampoo - Soothing Anti-Itch Formula with Tea Tree & Lavender - Calms, Cools & Relieves Itchy, Irritated Skin - Deep Cleansing & Removes Odour from Smelly Dogs, 4L
features: TOTAL TRANQUILLITY: Combines soothing ingredients like Tea Tree and Lavender to gently clean, relax, and heal itchy or irritated skin.
COOL CLEAN: Provides a cooling sensation while cleaning, offering relief and freshness to pets with skin issues or those who get nervous during baths.
PERFECT FOR PETS WITH SKIN ISSUES: Specifically designed for pets with skin issues, this shampoo helps reduce scratching and speeds up the recovery process.
SOOTHING AND CALMING: Infused with Tea Tree and Lavender, known for their calming properties, to provide relief and prevent the return of itchy or irritated skin.
PROFESSIONAL QUALITY: Groom Professional is a trusted brand among professional groomers, ensuring that you're using a high-quality product for your beloved furry friend.
description: Product description Perfect for pets with skin issues, Groom Professional Tranquil Shampoo combines a range of soothing ingredients to gently clean, relax, and heal itchy or irritated skin. Reduces your pet’s need to scratch, speeding up the recovery process. Tranquil shampoo is packed with specially formulated ingredients. Among these are Tea Tree and Lavender. known for their soothing properties, these healing ingredients will reduce pain, and scratching and prevent the return of itchy or irritated skin. Cool Clean This shampoo cleans as it cools, providing that much-needed relief while gently cleaning and deodorising. Perfect for pets with skin issues, smelly coats, or who get a little nervous or over-excited at bath time. Soothing and calming shampoo Perfect for pets with skin issues Contains Tea Tree and Lavender Soothing scent Dilutes 12:1 Directions [GENERIC] Wet your pet's fur, apply the product, massage it into the fur and skin, and rinse off.
